## Meeting Purpose

[Panel interview with Gloria Willis for Events Marketing Manager role at GrowthX.ai](https://fathom.video/share/T6_UW5macCVZVxDuG8915g83pLi-xyLW?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Gloria presented a comprehensive plan for executive dinners and a user conference, showcasing deep events expertise](https://fathom.video/share/T6_UW5macCVZVxDuG8915g83pLi-xyLW?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [GrowthX.ai has a strong existing community and event cadence, seeking to scale and enhance their programs](https://fathom.video/share/T6_UW5macCVZVxDuG8915g83pLi-xyLW?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [There's alignment on the importance of community-building and creating genuine, collaborative experiences](https://fathom.video/share/T6_UW5macCVZVxDuG8915g83pLi-xyLW?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Budget considerations and balancing high-quality experiences with ROI are key focus areas](https://fathom.video/share/T6_UW5macCVZVxDuG8915g83pLi-xyLW?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### Gloria's Background and Approach

  - [10+ years experience in event management and strategy](https://fathom.video/share/T6_UW5macCVZVxDuG8915g83pLi-xyLW?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
  - [Focused on executive activations and data-driven planning](https://fathom.video/share/T6_UW5macCVZVxDuG8915g83pLi-xyLW?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
  - [Emphasizes creating environments for community connection and learning](https://fathom.video/share/T6_UW5macCVZVxDuG8915g83pLi-xyLW?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [Applies experience from Pavilion and current construction/oil & gas industry role](https://fathom.video/share/T6_UW5macCVZVxDuG8915g83pLi-xyLW?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)

### Executive Dinner Strategy

  - [Free, in-person dinners blending roundtable discussions and elevated dining](https://fathom.video/share/T6_UW5macCVZVxDuG8915g83pLi-xyLW?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
  - [Target C-suite, VPs, and senior directors with buying power](https://fathom.video/share/T6_UW5macCVZVxDuG8915g83pLi-xyLW?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
  - [Proposed "roadshow" approach: New York, central location (e.g., Dallas), San Francisco](https://fathom.video/share/T6_UW5macCVZVxDuG8915g83pLi-xyLW?tab=summary&timestamp=536.0)
  - [Venue ideas: private residences, exclusive clubs, unique restaurant spaces](https://fathom.video/share/T6_UW5macCVZVxDuG8915g83pLi-xyLW?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
  - [Promotion timeline: 12 weeks out for initial invites, 8 weeks for one-to-one outreach](https://fathom.video/share/T6_UW5macCVZVxDuG8915g83pLi-xyLW?tab=summary&timestamp=972.0)

### User Conference Proposal ("Growth Exchange")

  - [Suggested for Q2 2026, targeting 150-200 attendees](https://fathom.video/share/T6_UW5macCVZVxDuG8915g83pLi-xyLW?tab=summary&timestamp=1197.0)
  - [Venue recommendation: The Pearl in San Francisco for flexibility and atmosphere](https://fathom.video/share/T6_UW5macCVZVxDuG8915g83pLi-xyLW?tab=summary&timestamp=1951.0)
  - [Tiered pricing strategy: $49 (early bird) to $149 (last 30 days)](https://fathom.video/share/T6_UW5macCVZVxDuG8915g83pLi-xyLW?tab=summary&timestamp=1085.0)
  - [Comprehensive promotion plan including email, social media, and partner outreach](https://fathom.video/share/T6_UW5macCVZVxDuG8915g83pLi-xyLW?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
  - [Focus on creating actionable takeaways and collaborative experiences](https://fathom.video/share/T6_UW5macCVZVxDuG8915g83pLi-xyLW?tab=summary&timestamp=1311.0)

### GrowthX.ai's Current Event Success

  - [Recent events with high attendance: 45/46 for dinner, 80 RSVPs for launch party](https://fathom.video/share/T6_UW5macCVZVxDuG8915g83pLi-xyLW?tab=summary&timestamp=1452.0)
  - [Strong existing network allows for quick turnaround on event planning (2-3 weeks)](https://fathom.video/share/T6_UW5macCVZVxDuG8915g83pLi-xyLW?tab=summary&timestamp=1480.0)
  - [Growing paid community membership (30+ members) and workshop attendance (400-1000 registrants)](https://fathom.video/share/T6_UW5macCVZVxDuG8915g83pLi-xyLW?tab=summary&timestamp=2629.0)

### Community Building Integration

  - [Suggestion to separate community leadership from event management roles](https://fathom.video/share/T6_UW5macCVZVxDuG8915g83pLi-xyLW?tab=summary&timestamp=3366.0)
  - [Emphasis on having a dedicated face for the community to drive engagement](https://fathom.video/share/T6_UW5macCVZVxDuG8915g83pLi-xyLW?tab=summary&timestamp=3385.0)
  - [Recognition of GrowthX.ai's existing community initiatives and desire to scale](https://fathom.video/share/T6_UW5macCVZVxDuG8915g83pLi-xyLW?tab=summary&timestamp=3457.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Review Gloria's references and move quickly on hiring decision](https://fathom.video/share/T6_UW5macCVZVxDuG8915g83pLi-xyLW?tab=summary&timestamp=3464.0)
  - [Consider separating community leadership and event management roles as the company scales](https://fathom.video/share/T6_UW5macCVZVxDuG8915g83pLi-xyLW?tab=summary&timestamp=3449.0)
  - [Explore ways to integrate more collaborative, learning-focused experiences into events](https://fathom.video/share/T6_UW5macCVZVxDuG8915g83pLi-xyLW?tab=summary&timestamp=3206.0)
  - [Evaluate budget allocations for high-impact elements like AV and notable speakers](https://fathom.video/share/T6_UW5macCVZVxDuG8915g83pLi-xyLW?tab=summary&timestamp=1662.0)
  - [Develop a strategy to expand event reach beyond San Francisco, leveraging existing network](https://fathom.video/share/T6_UW5macCVZVxDuG8915g83pLi-xyLW?tab=summary&timestamp=1341.0)
